metricsToCollect: Agent spawn latency (50 agents, serial vs parallel)

bottleneckIdentificationStrategy: Run 50 agents, measure total wall-clock time
Run 25 agents sequentially, measure total time
Compare: sequential time / 2 vs parallel time (should be ~2x if linear scaling)
Profile CPU, memory, disk, network on peak load
Identify which resource is exhausted (CPU, disk, memory, I/O)
